calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-27-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Michelle Brant, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff David O'Reilly is not present. Plaintiff is available by phone conference.
Joseph Dermer appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Vina Uy is present.
Edward Baba representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was not filed.

This case settled, the trial date of April 1, 2008 is vacated.
